vehicle.title: Vehicle
vehicle.description: A vehicle owned by the user.

userId.description: The UID of the user who owns the vehicle.

nickname.description: A friendly name for the vehicle.

registration.description: The registration number of the vehicle.

fuelLog.title: Fuel Log
fuelLog.description: A record of a vehicle fuel fill-up.

userId.description: The UID of the user who created the log.

vehicleId.description: The ID of the vehicle this log belongs to.

kmsSinceLastRefill.description: Kilometers traveled since the last refill.

totalKms.description: Total odometer reading at the time of refill.

ridingMode.description: The riding mode or driving style used during this period.

rideType.description: The type of ride (City, Highway, or Mixed).

calculatedConsumption.description: Fuel consumption as calculated by the trip computer (km/L or L/100km).

photoUrl.description: URL of the trip computer photo (if stored).

actualConsumption.description: Actual fuel consumption calculated from liters and kms (km/L).

discrepancy.description: Difference between calculated and actual consumption (km/L).

totalCost.description: Total cost of the fuel refill.

tripPhoto.description: URL of the trip computer photo stored in Firebase Storage.

receipts.description: List of URLs for fuel receipts stored in Firebase Storage.

feedback.title: Feedback
feedback.description: User feedback and feature requests for app improvement.

userId.description: The UID of the user who submitted the feedback (if authenticated).

userEmail.description: The email of the user (if authenticated).

text.description: The detailed description of the feedback.
